metadata.description: Astrid — run agent runtimes (Claude Code, and other MCP clients) as governed Astrid agents.

plugins.name: astrid
plugins.description: Turn a vanilla `claude` REPL into a governed Astrid agent: capsule tools over MCP, an ephemeral self-cleaning daemon, a readiness doctor, an Astrid HUD status line, and an Astrid-agent identity. Astrid stays agent-agnostic; this is the Claude-specific adapter.
